top_findings.title: Test suite fails to initialize: FastAPI lifespan + Starlette version mismatch
top_findings.evidence: pytest output: TypeError: Router.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'on_startup' at main.py:14
top_findings.suggestion: Update Starlette version to >= 0.41.0 or use compatible FastAPI version

top_findings.title: SQL injection vulnerability in update_book
top_findings.evidence: main.py:95 uses f-string for SQL construction: f"UPDATE books SET {set_clause} WHERE id = ?" without parameterization of column names
top_findings.suggestion: Use a SQL builder or validate column names against allowlist

top_findings.title: At least 3 unit/integration tests defined but cannot execute
top_findings.evidence: test_books.py contains 12 test functions, but all fail at setup stage due to FastAPI version incompatibility
top_findings.suggestion: Resolve FastAPI/Starlette version conflict to enable test execution
